gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/256)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/256)
text: يَوْمُ الْأَضْحَى فِي الْيَوْمِ الَّذِي يُصَامُ فِيهِ وَ يَوْمُ الْعَاشُورَاءِ فِي الْيَوْمِ الَّذِي يُفْطَرُ فِيهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Husayn Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The day of the slaughter is among the days in which it is Fasted, and the day of Ashura is the day which it is not Fasted’.
en.sarwar: 37. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il from al-Husayn ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The day of al-Adha’ can coincide with a day for fasting, and al-‘Ashura’ with a day which is not for fasting.’” (Please consult Fatwa about Hadith 37 of this Chapter)
